title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at UltraTech Cement are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
